contents:
Hey, I’m Kai 👋 I’m a 23-year-old recent graduate from San Jose State University, where I studied International Business with a specialization in Global Operations Management. My professional interests sit at the intersection of global logistics, supply chain systems, and marketing — fields where strategy meets execution on a world stage.
As you explore this site, you’ll find a collection of projects spanning internships, coursework, and elected leadership roles. Whether it’s building vendor evaluation frameworks, supporting pharmaceutical marketing campaigns, or coordinating cross-border logistics, I bring the same approach to everything: show up, learn fast, and add value.
I’m an extrovert at heart and thrive in cross-functional environments where different perspectives come together to solve real problems.
A Little More About Me 🌏 Japanese speaker (intermediate) — I’ve been to Japan 10+ times, and during my study abroad at Sophia University in Tokyo, I somehow ended up working shifts at a falafel shop. No regrets. 🇰🇭 Half Chinese-Cambodian — I’ve visited Cambodia three times and hope to deepen that connection over time, both personally and professionally. 📰 News reader — always trying to stay sharp on what’s happening in global markets and geopolitics. 🏋️ Afternoon gym sessions — consistency over intensity. 🗺️ Side quest enthusiast — if there’s a new food spot within reasonable driving distance, I’m probably already looking it up. Currently open to opportunities in global operations, supply chain, and logistics. Feel free to reach out via the contact page or connect with me on LinkedIn.
title: About

contents:
Kai Sano Lim ksano.limo.int@gmail.com | (215) 206-3173 | linkedin.com/in/kai-s-lim | San Jose, CA
GLOBAL BUSINESS PERSPECTIVE | PHARMACEUTICAL MARKETING | CROSS-FUNCTIONAL OPERATIONS
Emerging international business professional with hands-on experience in pharmaceutical marketing, quality assurance (QA), and supply chain management. Focused on bridging cultural and functional gaps within international teams, delivering strategic insights through adaptability, strong interpersonal skills, and a collaborative mindset.
Areas of Expertise ✔ Marketing Best Practices ✔ Global Business Operations ✔ Business Process Optimization ✔ Regulatory Compliance ✔ Cross-Team Collaboration ✔ Vendor and Supplier Assessment ✔ Intercultural Communication ✔ Technical Communication ✔ International Cultural Competence Education and Certification Bachelor of Science in Business Administration: International Business — Global Operations Management San Jose State University (SJSU) | August 2021 – May 2026
Study Abroad Program: Faculty of Liberal Arts Sophia University (Tokyo, Japan) | January – May 2024
Relevant Coursework BUS 189 – Strategic Management | BUS 190 – Fundamentals of Business Analytics | BUS 141 – Procurement and Supply Management | BUS 144 – Supply Chain Management | BUS 144B – Operations and Supply Chain Analysis
Recent Professional Experience Marketing Intern | Taiho Pharmaceutical Co. May – August 2025
Supported the launch strategy and reimagined positioning of INQOVI — a treatment for myelodysplastic syndromes — by gathering scientific insights and expanded use in treating acute myeloid leukemia. Engaged in cross-functional meetings with legal, clinical operations, and sales teams to understand department workflows and regulatory standards within a highly structured pharmaceutical environment. Completed sales team training sessions to deepen knowledge of compound mechanisms and treatment pathways to strengthen ability to create brand messaging with clinical accuracy. Built rapport with senior leaders across departments through 1-on-1 mentoring and networking to cultivate industry expertise and soft skills essential for long-term success in global business settings. Professional Intern | ETP System Innovations May – August 2023
Developed an Excel-based inventory system to catalog model descriptions, part numbers, and serial numbers for streamlined warehouse operations and improved retrieval efficiency. Designed and generated updated marketing materials for corporate partners, contributing to refreshed outreach strategies during a busy business cycle. Coordinated with the shipping and receiving department to ensure timely global logistics execution. Quality Assurance Intern | Astex Pharmaceuticals June – July 2022
Created an evaluation scorecard for over 25 vendors aligned with FDA and ECDC regulations to empower the Quality Assurance team to operate more effectively and to better assess GLP compliance. Presented the new scorecard tool to over 200 staff at a company-wide meeting; a modified version has since been adopted in ongoing QA operations. Leadership Roles Alumni Relations Chair | Sigma Nu, Zeta Iota Chapter — January 2024 – August 2025
Global Ambassador | SJSU Study Abroad Program — October 2023 – October 2024
title: Resume

contents:
Kai Sano Lim Recent San Jose State University graduate building a career in global operations, supply chain, logistics, and marketing.
I bring a global perspective, strong interpersonal skills, and hands-on experience across pharmaceutical marketing, quality assurance, and operational coordination. This site is a focused overview of my background, the work I have done, and the kind of teams I want to contribute to next.
What I Bring Cross-functional experience across marketing, QA, vendor evaluation, and logistics International exposure through study abroad and multilingual, multicultural environments A practical working style centered on execution, communication, and fast learning Current Focus I am actively pursuing early-career opportunities in:
Global operations Supply chain and procurement Logistics and international business Commercial and strategic marketing roles Highlights Supported launch strategy and market positioning work at Taiho Pharmaceutical Built internal tools and operational materials at ETP System Innovations Created a vendor evaluation scorecard adopted in QA workflows at Astex Pharmaceuticals Served in campus leadership and ambassador roles that required relationship-building and coordination Next Steps Read more about me, review my resume, or connect on LinkedIn.
title: Home
